catalog_row.Paper: Does inflation increase after a monetary policy tightening? Answers based on a estimated DSGE model
catalog_row.ModelType: linearized estimated New Keynesian DSGE with working-capital cost channel

check English and Chinese F-number counts match

unresolved_issues: Source-level PDF review should check OCR-sensitive nonlinear working-capital and utilization-cost notation.
